ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., Administrator, Editor, Author) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is active */,
  "inherited_from" INTEGER /* ID of the role from which this role inherits permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_inheritance" (
  "inheritance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inheritance relationship */,
  "parent_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent role */,
  "child_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child role that inherits from the parent */,
  "is_direct" INTEGER /* Indicates if the inheritance is direct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inheritance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_inheritance_child_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_inheritance_parent_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role to which the permission belongs */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., create_post, edit_post, delete_post) */,
  "is_inherited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is inherited from a parent role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account (hashed for security) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user account */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the role is assigned */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role assignment is active */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was assigned */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_change_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change entry */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role that was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_change_history_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_change_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permission_change_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change entry */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission that was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., added, removed) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permission_change_history_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES role_permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permission_change_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permission_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change entry */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role to which the permission was assigned */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission that was assigned */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., assigned, revoked) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permission_history_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permission_history_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES role_permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permission_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity performed (e.g., login, role creation, permission assignment) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity performed */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "performed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the activity */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user performing the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
